hero.subtitle: Interior design, architecture and custom furniture. We create spaces that tell your story.

home.introTitle: Spaces designed to be lived in
home.introText: At Skala Studio we bring together architecture, interior design and custom furniture in a single process. Every project starts by listening to how you live, to design functional, warm and timeless spaces.
home.ctaText: Let's talk about transforming your space.

services.title: Services
services.subtitle: We support every stage of the project, from concept to delivery.

interior.name: Interior Design
interior.desc: Full interior design for homes and commercial spaces: layout, materials, lighting and styling that reflect your identity.

architecture.name: Architecture
architecture.desc: Residential and commercial architectural projects, from schematic design to construction supervision, focused on light, context and efficiency.

furniture.name: Custom Furniture
furniture.desc: We design and build unique pieces tailored to the millimeter: kitchens, closets, media units and bespoke furniture.

process.name: Listen
process.desc: We learn about your lifestyle, needs and budget in a first meeting.

process.name: Conceptualize
process.desc: We develop the design concept with plans, palettes and 3D renders.

process.name: Build
process.desc: We coordinate construction, furniture fabrication and suppliers with constant supervision.

process.name: Deliver
process.desc: We install, style and hand over your space ready to be lived in.

projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: A selection of spaces we have imagined and built.

studio.title: The studio
studio.heroText: We are an architecture and design studio that believes spaces transform the lives of those who inhabit them.
studio.philosophyText: Every project is a chance to rethink how a space is lived in. We design with empathy: we observe routines, light, materials and emotions to create honest, functional and beautiful places that age well.

values.name: Purposeful design
values.desc: Nothing is decorative by accident: every decision responds to how you live.

values.name: Craft & precision
values.desc: From the blueprint to the millimeter of each piece, we care for every detail.

values.name: Honest materials
values.desc: Natural woods, stones and textures that bring warmth and permanence.

values.name: Closeness
values.desc: We accompany and communicate every stage; your project is ours too.

contact.title: Let's talk about your project
contact.subtitle: Tell us what you imagine and we'll reply within 48 hours.

form.name: Name
form.messagePh: Tell us about your space, timeline and approximate budget…
form.success: Thank you! Your message was sent. We'll be in touch soon.
